title: Domestic Disturbance
description: Neighbor reports a loud argument escalating.

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: I hear screaming and things breaking next door.

chunks.speaker: dispatcher
chunks.text: Do you hear threats or mention of weapons?

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: I heard someone yell 'put the knife down'.

chunks.speaker: dispatcher
chunks.text: Can you safely stay inside and away from windows?

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: Yes, but I can still hear screaming.
